mapper.insert: INSERT INTO points_record (user_id, points, total_points, source_type, source_id, reason) VALUES (#{userId}, #{points}, #{totalPoints}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceId}, #{reason})
mapper.select: SELECT pr.*, u.username, u.full_name FROM points_record pr LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON pr.user_id = u.id WHERE pr.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC
SELECT pr.*, u.username, u.full_name FROM points_record pr LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON pr.user_id = u.id ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT vp.user_id, u.username, u.full_name, u.avatar, vp.total_points, COUNT(DISTINCT ti.id) as completed_tasks, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY vp.total_points DESC) as ranking FROM volunteer_profile vp LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON vp.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN task_info ti ON ti.volunteer_id = vp.user_id AND ti.status = 'APPROVED' WHERE vp.volunteer_status = 'APPROVED' AND vp.total_points > 0 GROUP BY vp.user_id, u.username, u.full_name, u.avatar, vp.total_points ORDER BY vp.total_points DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT pr.user_id, u.username, u.full_name, u.avatar, CAST(SUM(pr.points) AS UNSIGNED) as total_points, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN pr.source_type = 'TASK_COMPLETE' THEN pr.source_id END) as completed_tasks, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(pr.points) DESC) as ranking FROM points_record pr LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON pr.user_id = u.id WHERE pr.points > 0 AND pr.created_at >= #{startDate} GROUP BY pr.user_id, u.username, u.full_name, u.avatar ORDER BY total_points DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT ranking FROM ( SELECT user_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY total_points DESC) as ranking FROM volunteer_profile WHERE volunteer_status = 'APPROVED' AND total_points > 0 ) ranked WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task_info WHERE volunteer_id = #{userId} AND status = 'APPROVED'
